rule: 先生成或定位最终口播音频，再回填字幕时间轴；手写时间只能用于粗预览。
steps: Generate final voiceover from example_voiceover_units.json or record human narration.
Run transcription or forced alignment to recover sentence/word timestamps.
Map every cue to voice_id and visual_section_id.
Update Remotion data to read generated subtitle timeline before final render.
fallback: If forced alignment is unavailable, mark cues as estimated_after_audio_duration_fit and distribute timings by measured audio duration.
rough_preview_status: current preview uses estimated subtitle timing and no generated voiceover
